title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
